purpose: Evaluate Agent Map as a practical LLM-Wiki operating system while preserving this repo's existing strengths: GitHub control-plane, public/private safety boundary, multi-agent routing, runtime dashboards, and life-process graph.

target.northStar: Agent Map should become a durable LLM-Wiki style operating layer where life/work signals are captured with low friction, converted into reusable knowledge, searched with evidence, routed to agents, verified, and synthesized back into the user's life/process map.
doNotSacrifice: GitHub Issues/Project as durable work queue and responsibility ledger
Codex / 다알고 as mainstream coordinator and final integration owner
explicit human gates for secrets, publish/upload, payments, destructive actions, raw private data, and final close
public-safe dashboard surfaces that do not leak raw private data
static deployment and runtime JSON artifacts as inspectable evidence

globalCaps.reason: Search/reuse ROI sample is below minimum evidence (5/3/3).

dimensions.label: Zero-friction capture
dimensions.strength: Kakao, GitHub issue, session-agent, and runtime artifacts already act as capture channels.
dimensions.gap: Capture is still source-specific and does not yet produce a unified inbox note stream.
dimensions.next: Create a normalized capture inbox schema before adding heavier RAG infrastructure.

dimensions.label: Public/private safety boundary
dimensions.strength: The project has a strong public-safe artifact pattern: raw messages, room ids, raw URLs, and secrets stay out of public pages.
dimensions.gap: Private local views and public views are not yet first-class separate surfaces.
dimensions.next: Keep the public-safe layer, but add explicit private/local-only retrieval contracts.

dimensions.label: Atomic knowledge vault
dimensions.strength: Obsidian-style atomic notes, frontmatter, wikilinks, and lookup modes already exist.
dimensions.gap: Captured operational outputs are not yet automatically converted into durable atomic notes.
dimensions.next: Add capture-to-note promotion rules with provenance and stale-note checks.

dimensions.label: Retrieval and graph index
dimensions.strength: Graphify is already treated correctly as a derived index, not the source of truth.
dimensions.gap: A static retrieval pilot exists before full vector DB/RAG, but real search/reuse events are still needed.
dimensions.next: Use the static retrieval pilot to collect cited-answer and reuse events before evaluating BGE-M3 + Qdrant.

dimensions.label: Agent execution loop
dimensions.strength: The repo already records loop evidence and separates bounded actions from human-gated work.
dimensions.gap: Actual replacement-ready life domains are still not achieved.
dimensions.next: Convert repeated low-risk loops into measurable replacement candidates before claiming agentization.

dimensions.label: Synthesis and feedback
dimensions.strength: Weekly synthesis exists as a principle/runbook and life-loop feedback exists as runtime evidence.
dimensions.gap: Synthesis is not yet a consistently scheduled, user-facing weekly artifact.
dimensions.next: Create a weekly synthesis artifact that links new captures, decisions, and knowledge gaps.

dimensions.label: Search and reuse ROI measurement
dimensions.strength: Runtime artifacts make future ROI measurement possible.
dimensions.gap: Search/citation/reuse events are now logged, but the sample size is still too small for durable ROI conclusions.
dimensions.next: Keep logging real search, cited-answer, reused-note, and action-conversion events before investing in full RAG/MCP automation.

caps.reason: Search/reuse ROI events have started, but the sample size is still too small.

dimensions.label: Integrated UX visibility
dimensions.strength: Agent Map already exposes public results, infrastructure, knowledge, and Kakao analysis in one deployed surface.
dimensions.gap: The UX is still more dashboard/index than true knowledge workbench.
dimensions.next: Add one workbench-style path: ask → retrieve evidence → show source → create issue/action.

blockers: Search/reuse ROI has started but needs at least 5/3/3 search/citation/reuse events.
implementationDirection: Do not replace Agent Map with a generic PKM tool; keep GitHub/Registry/static dashboards as the control-plane.
Promote captured signals into atomic notes only after sanitization and provenance checks.
Keep Graphify/RAG/MCP as derived capability layers, never source of truth.
Prioritize measured reuse: search count, cited answer count, action conversion, and stale-note reduction.
Preserve human-gated boundaries while letting agents run bounded evidence-producing loops.
recommendation: Keep Agent Map as the control-plane and add LLM-Wiki capability as a measured layer.
Next milestone: real search/citation/reuse event logging from the retrieval pilot.
Do not claim full RAG/MCP or full-domain replacement readiness until ROI and replacement-ready domains are visible; use scoped replacement as the next honest milestone.
